phase_title: Runtime Enforcement Decision Engine Contract Design
no_go_confirmation: No runtime enforcement. No real backend invocation. No adapter execution. No subprocess execution. No shell execution. No network call. No shell interception. No Telegram inbound. No Telegram polling. No remote shell. No automatic apply. No apply execution. No patch parsing. No commit authorization. No push authorization. No real AI backend calls. No executable artifact-only invocation path. No execution enablement flag. No execution availability toggle. No cryptographic signing. No remote attestation. No database-backed audit storage. No shell mediation. No rollback execution. No file mutation rollback. No automatic restore. No git reset/checkout/revert execution. Telegram outbound-only. Execution unavailable. All auth flags False. Contract design only. Recommends 102B.
recommended_next_phase: 102B — Runtime Enforcement Decision Engine Contract Freeze
summary: Phase 102A complete: Runtime Enforcement Decision Engine Contract Design. Design with minimal model. RuntimeEnforcementDecision dataclass: 9 statuses, 12 results (all blocking/non-executing), SHA-256 digest, 22 fail-closed rules. 22 tests. 722 combined. Recommends 102B.
